## IWorkspaceCreateParams.encryption property

Additional encryption configuration options. The workspace automatically wires up the key store's secret provider.

**Signature:**

```typescript
readonly encryption?: Partial<Omit<IEncryptionConfig, 'secretProvider'>>;
```
